statement.informal: `slenderness_ratio` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (effective_length_factor >= K_MIN ∧ effective_length_factor <= K_MAX ∧ unsupported_length >= L_MIN ∧ unsupported_length <= L_MAX ∧ radius_of_gyration >= R_GYRATION_MIN ∧ radius_of_gyration <= R_GYRATION_MAX), the function's result satisfies (result >= 0.0 ∧ result <= SLENDERNESS_MAX). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
statement.formal_lean:
